page_metadata.biotools__summary: The electrodiffusive Pinsky-Rinzel (edPR) model is multicompartmental neuron model that accounts for electrodiffusive ion concentration dynamics in a way that ensures a biophysically consistent relationship between ion concentrations, electrical charge, and electrical potentials in both the intra- and extracellular space.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The electrodiffusive Pinsky-Rinzel (edPR) model is multicompartmental neuron model that accounts for electrodiffusive ion concentration dynamics in a way that ensures a biophysically consistent relationship between ion concentrations, electrical charge, and electrical potentials in both the intra- and extracellular space.
